verdict: ReFa's S Carat Roller is the category leader (4.5★, 5800 reviews) combining premium materials with proven microcirculation benefits; the platinum coating and wave motion justify luxury positioning. Pure craftsmanship excellence.

_research.name: ReFa S Carat Facial Roller
_research.con: Purely mechanical tool with modest clinical evidence; premium pricing based on brand heritage rather than innovation.
